ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutual fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutual fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the mutual fund (e.g., Equity, Arbitrage) */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy employed by the fund */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* The asset class of the fund (e.g., Stocks, Bonds, Real Estate) */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* The benchmark index against which the fund's performance is measured */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* The date the fund was established */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* The risk profile of the fund (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* The percentage of the fund's assets charged as a management fee */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* The percentage of the fund's assets used to cover operating expenses */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* The minimum amount required to invest in the fund */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the fund is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the fund's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the performance is associated with */,
  "one_year_return" REAL /* 1-year return percentage of the fund */,
  "three_year_return" REAL /* 3-year return percentage of the fund */,
  "five_year_return" REAL /* 5-year return percentage of the fund */,
  "since_inception_return" REAL /* Total return percentage since the fund's inception */,
  "year_to_date_return" REAL /* Return percentage of the fund from the beginning of the year to the current date */,
  "quarterly_return_1" REAL /* Return percentage of the fund in the first quarter of the current year */,
  "quarterly_return_2" REAL /* Return percentage of the fund in the second quarter of the current year */,
  "quarterly_return_3" REAL /* Return percentage of the fund in the third quarter of the current year */,
  "quarterly_return_4" REAL /* Return percentage of the fund in the fourth quarter of the current year */,
  "alpha" REAL /* The alpha of the fund, indicating its performance relative to the benchmark */,
  "beta" REAL /* The beta of the fund, indicating its volatility relative to the market */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* The Sharpe ratio of the fund, indicating its risk-adjusted return */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the performance data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "investment_experience" INTEGER /* Years of investment experience */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the investor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the investor */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Investment objective of the investor (e.g., Growth, Income, Capital Preservation) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the investor (e.g., Conservative, Moderate, Aggressive) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the investor's account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the investor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor making the investment */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund being invested in */,
  "amount_invested" REAL /* Amount invested by the investor */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return percentage of the investment */,
  "actual_return" REAL /* Actual return percentage of the investment */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the investment is still open */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the investment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the fund's performance metrics */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Performance, Risk, Compliance) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is confidential */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, advisor, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
